seoTitle: Forrest Beach vs Forrestdale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Forrest Beach and Forrestdale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Forrest Beach vs Forrestdale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Forrest Beach and Forrestdale.
heading: Forrest Beach vs Forrestdale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Forrest Beach, Western Australia and Forrestdale, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Forrestdale has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Forrest Beach (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Forrest Beach or Forrestdale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Forrest Beach has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Forrestdale scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Forrest Beach scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Forrestdale scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Forrest Beach or Forrestdale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Forrestdale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
